texto: Courage is holding on one minute longer than everyone else. Courage is stepping forward when every fiber of your being says step back. Courage is being willing to do the impossible because it is the right thing to do.
explicacao: Citação de Blaine Lee Pardoe sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Courage is holding on one minute longer than everyone else. Courage is stepping forward when ever…” articula coragem, reflexao, courage em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
